headline: Is Albemarle (ALB) Pricing Reflect Long Term Lithium Prospects After 114% One Year Rally
summary: If you are wondering whether Albemarle's current share price actually reflects its underlying worth, you are not alone. This article is here to unpack what the numbers suggest. Over the past year, Albemarle's stock has returned 114.0%, while the year to date return is 9.9%. Shorter term moves include a 2.5% decline over 7 days and a 9.8% decline over 30 days. Recent coverage has focused on Albemarle as a key lithium supplier in global battery supply chains, alongside ongoing discussion about...
